common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted entities.
common.condition_threshold_description: What to test for and threshold values.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.
common.trigger_threshold_changed_description: Which changes to trigger on and threshold values.
common.trigger_threshold_crossed_description: Which threshold crossing to trigger on and threshold values.

is_value.description: Tests if a relative humidity value is above a threshold, below a threshold, or in a range of values.
is_value.name: Relative humidity

changed.description: Triggers after one or more relative humidity values change.
changed.name: Relative humidity changed

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more relative humidity values cross a threshold.
crossed_threshold.name: Relative humidity crossed threshold
